title: CLARITY Act — Senate Resumes Markup Talks
desc: US Senate returns from Easter recess on April 13. Banking Committee markup is targeted for late April. Senator Lummis confirmed end-of-April target. If it doesn't pass committee before May, the bill risks being pushed past the November 2026 midterms.

title: US Producer Price Index (PPI)
desc: Key inflation indicator. A firm read keeps rate cut expectations pushed further out — bearish for risk assets. A soft print would boost sentiment across crypto and equities.

title: BlackRock Q1 2026 Earnings
desc: World's largest asset manager reports Q1 results. Watch for updates on Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF flows and tokenisation strategy. Key institutional signal for crypto.

title: US Retail Sales Data
desc: Measures consumer spending strength. Weak retail sales signal economic slowdown — mixed for crypto. Strong data reduces rate cut expectations.

title: FOMC Meeting — Fed Interest Rate Decision
desc: Federal Reserve meets April 28-29. Rate decision on April 29. BTC has sold off after 8 of the last 9 FOMC meetings. May be Powell's final meeting as Fed Chair before Kevin Warsh takes over May 15.

title: Robinhood Q1 2026 Earnings
desc: Key indicator of retail crypto demand. Focus on crypto trading volumes and digital asset revenue.
